creator: dym@afalina.od.ua
text:
This change solves the problem:
================================================
# diff /usr/ports/security/ipsec-tools/Makefile /usr/ports/security/ipsec-tools/Makefile.bad 
104c104
< .  if ${OSVERSION} >= 1200085 || ${SSL_DEFAULT} == openssl
---
> .  if ${OSVERSION} >= 1200085 && ${SSL_DEFAULT} != openssl
================================================

For some reason, the old version is back in release...
Please fix it forever.
